name: Team Milestone
description: A full-screen team-milestone celebration for digital signage. Puts a named team's milestone front and centre — a big value like "5 Years", "1,000,000 Users", or "Project Shipped" — with an optional caption, a message, and a date, all under a shower of confetti. Everything arrives in the launch URL, so one deployment celebrates any team's win.
summary: Celebrate a team's milestone on any display.

team.title: Team name
team.description: The team being celebrated, e.g. Team Phoenix. Shown above the milestone.

value.title: Milestone
value.description: The headline value, e.g. 5 Years, 1,000,000 Users, or Project Shipped.

label.title: Caption
label.description: Optional line under the milestone, e.g. of building together.

message.title: Message
message.description: Optional supporting sentence, e.g. a thank-you to the team.
